title: Orchard key derivation and UA assembly exist but no corresponding spend path
description: orchard.rs, unified.rs implement Orchard key derivation, FVK, address derivation, and UA encoding. A user calling the UA-generation path receives a UA with an Orchard receiver. Any payment sent to that Orchard receiver is silently dropped (scanner only handles Sapling). The wallet appears to support Orchard (generates valid Orchard addresses) but cannot receive Orchard funds. This is a promise the code cannot keep. Either remove orchard.rs from the public API until the scanner supports Orchard, or add a clear prominent warning to diversified_address / encode_unified_address that Orchard receipt is unimplemented.
